description: Returns a list of Monitoring Resources on a given project

parameters.name: forecast_start_date
parameters.description: Forecast start date, expressed in ISO 8601 date format (YYYY-MM-DD)

start_date.description: Start date, formatted based on the project's locale

end_date.description: End date, formatted based on the project's locale

units_remaining.description: Units remaining, calculated as of today or as of the provided forecast_start_date parameter

budget_line_item_id.description: ID of the associated Budget Line Item

currency_iso_code.description: Currency ISO Code configured for the financial entity
